hospitals.name: Abbotsford Regional Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the main parkade off Marshall Road. Hourly and daily rates apply. Accessible parking stalls are located near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Burnaby Hospital
hospitals.parking: Visitor parking is available in the lot off Kincaid Street. Pay stations accept credit cards and coins. Street parking may also be available on nearby roads.

hospitals.name: Chilliwack General Hospital
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available in designated visitor areas. Accessible parking is located near the main entrance and emergency department.

hospitals.name: Delta Hospital
hospitals.address: 5800 Mountain View Boulevard, Delta, BC V4K 3V6
hospitals.parking: Free visitor parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are located close to the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Eagle Ridge Hospital
hospitals.address: 475 Guildford Way, Port Moody, BC V3H 3W9
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the visitor lot. Hourly and daily rates apply. Accessible parking stalls are available near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Jim Pattison Outpatient Care and Surgery Centre
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade connected to the facility. Take a ticket upon entry and pay at the pay station before returning to your vehicle.
hospitals.note: This is a dedicated outpatient surgical facility. Most same-day surgeries in the Fraser Health region are performed here.

hospitals.name: Langley Memorial Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the visitor lot off Fraser Highway. Pay stations accept credit cards. Accessible parking is located near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Peace Arch Hospital
hospitals.address: 15521 Russell Avenue, White Rock, BC V4B 2R4
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available on site. Street parking may also be available in the surrounding neighbourhood.

hospitals.name: Ridge Meadows Hospital
hospitals.address: 11666 Laity Street, Maple Ridge, BC V2X 7G5
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the visitor lot. Hourly and daily rates apply. Accessible stalls are near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Royal Columbian Hospital
hospitals.address: 330 East Columbia Street, New Westminster, BC V3L 3W7
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade off East Columbia Street. This is a busy hospital — allow extra time to find parking. SkyTrain (Sapperton Station) is within walking distance.

hospitals.name: Surrey Memorial Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the main parkade and surface lots. This is a large campus — check which entrance your procedure is booked at. The Jim Pattison Outpatient Centre is a separate building on the same campus.

hospitals.name: Lions Gate Hospital
hospitals.address: 231 East 15th Street, North Vancouver, BC V7L 2L7
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade off 15th Street. Hourly and daily rates apply. Transit access is available via bus routes along Lonsdale Avenue.

hospitals.name: Mount Saint Joseph Hospital
hospitals.address: 3080 Prince Edward Street, Vancouver, BC V5T 3N4
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available on site. Street parking is limited in the surrounding area. Accessible by bus along Kingsway and Main Street.

hospitals.name: Powell River General Hospital
hospitals.address: 5000 Joyce Avenue, Powell River, BC V8A 5R3
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Richmond Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the visitor lot off Westminster Highway. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance. Canada Line (Richmond-Brighouse Station) is a short walk away.

hospitals.name: Sechelt Hospital
hospitals.address: 5544 Sunshine Coast Highway, Sechelt, BC V0N 3A0
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. The hospital is located on the Sunshine Coast Highway with easy access.

hospitals.name: Squamish General Hospital
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: St. Paul's Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade off Comox Street. Rates are higher than other sites due to the downtown location. Accessible by multiple bus routes and SkyTrain (Burrard Station).

hospitals.name: UBC Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available at the UBC parkades nearby (Thunderbird and Health Sciences parkades). Accessible by bus routes serving the UBC campus.

hospitals.name: Vancouver General Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the multi-level parkade off 12th Avenue and in surface lots. This is a very large campus — confirm which pavilion your procedure is in (Jim Pattison Pavilion, Gordon & Leslie Diamond Health Care Centre, etc.). Canada Line (Broadway–City Hall Station) is nearby.

hospitals.name: BC Children's Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade off Oak Street. Accessible parking and drop-off zones are located near the main entrance.
hospitals.note: Pediatric surgical care. For patients under 18 years of age.

hospitals.name: BC Women's Hospital and Health Centre
hospitals.parking: Shares the Oak Street campus with BC Children's Hospital. Pay parking is available in the parkade off Oak Street.
hospitals.note: Specialized care for women and newborns. Located on the same campus as BC Children's Hospital.

hospitals.name: Campbell River Hospital
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are located near the main entrance.

hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance.

hospitals.name: Royal Jubilee Hospital
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the parkade and surface lots. Bus routes serve the hospital along Bay Street and Richmond Road.

hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the visitor lot. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance.

hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available on site. This is the major referral hospital for Northern BC — allow extra time to find your way.

hospitals.name: Cambie Surgery Centre
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available on nearby streets and in commercial lots. Accessible by Canada Line (King Edward Station).
hospitals.note: Private surgical facility. Check with your surgeon about specific arrival instructions.

hospitals.name: False Creek Healthcare Centre
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in the building parkade. Accessible by Canada Line (Broadway–City Hall Station) and multiple bus routes.
hospitals.note: Private surgical facility. Check with your surgeon about specific arrival instructions.

hospitals.name: Okanagan Health Surgical Centre
hospitals.parking: Free parking is available on site. Accessible parking stalls are near the main entrance.
hospitals.note: Private surgical facility in Kelowna. Check with your surgeon about specific arrival instructions.

hospitals.name: Specialist Referral Clinic
hospitals.parking: Pay parking is available in nearby commercial lots and parkades. Located in downtown Vancouver — accessible by SkyTrain (Burrard Station) and multiple bus routes.
hospitals.note: Private surgical facility. Check with your surgeon about specific arrival instructions.
